## What does this PR do?

<!-- One paragraph. What problem does it solve or what capability does it add? -->

## Type of change

<!-- Mark the one that applies -->

- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` — code change that neither fixes a bug nor adds a feature
- [ ] `chore` — dependency update, tooling, config
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `ci` — CI/CD pipeline changes
- [ ] `infra` — infrastructure / Docker / deployment

## Checklist

- [ ] PR title follows `type(scope): Description` — e.g. `feat(ats): Add PDF resume parsing`
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or personal paths committed
- [ ] No binary files or data dumps committed (PDFs, CSVs, Excel)
- [ ] `README.md` updated if a project was added, changed, or removed
- [ ] CI checks pass
